programme.desc: After Plankton forgets who he is, the Dartfish family adopts him.

programme.desc: Lola and her nemesis, Lindsey Sweetwater, join forces to uncover a mystery while competing at a pageant.

programme.desc: Lincoln convinces his teacher, Mr. Bolhofner, to join the Doo-Dads in order to get a better seat in class.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Console Of The Future
programme.desc: Robbie has his eye on an expensive console but when his birthday arrives he receives a cheap knock off instead. He's disappointed until he finds out that the controller he's been given has the power to control other people.

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: Tori Boggs: Jump Rope Champion
programme.desc: Tori Boggs holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frog double under skips in thirty seconds. The legendary jump roper shows how her record-breaking skipping skills helped her become the best in the world.

programme.title: Mountain Bridge
programme.desc: Construct a mountain bridge!

programme.title: The Lockdown Showdown
programme.desc: Acro gymnasts Dylan and Nyree have come up with a special lockdown competition, and all the Gym Stars are getting involved.

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Myths and Legends
programme.desc: After taking care of his daily chores, Howler ‘gets away from it all' by daydreaming about wonderful encounters! In the process, he takes us through various contemporary beliefs, myths and legends, powered by his very rich imagination.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Sneezy Snufflies
programme.desc: When Mrs. Rorschach suddenly develops an allergy, every indictor points to Mr. Tiggles as the cause. Addison has to solve the mystery before Mrs. Rorschach and her kitty are forced to part ways forever!

programme.title: The Rare Bird
programme.desc: Gabi spots a rare woodpecker. Two members of the Worldwide Expedition Club come to lake Weewannanoh, hoping to see it. Did Gabi really see what she thinks she saw? Gabi is determined to prove that she was right. Can Doki keep the peace on this bird-watching expedition?

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Sprinter 2.0
programme.desc: Sprinter fixes an exoskeleton called 'Sprinter 2.0' so it can help him with his heroic deeds, and of course, Cleopatra immediately set her eyes on it. Unfortunately for both of them, 'Sprinter 2.0' has its own will and has a different plan for itself.

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Ebb's New Friend
programme.desc: Ebb and Flo are inseparable best friends but Bird arrives and gets in the way. Ebb is upset. Until learning to share is understood. Now Ebb, Bird and Flo are the best of friends. Things couldn't be better!

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Bee
programme.desc: Henry meets a worker bee, outside its hive in a wildlife park. Henry becomes a Bee, flies around collects lots of nectar.

programme.title: Saving Goliath
programme.desc: The discovery that Teresa is fed up with Goliath's incompetence causes celebration at Team Alien HQ, until they realize any replacement would be better for Teresa and worse for them.

programme.title: E20 - Mango
programme.desc: It's wish-granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: E4 - Veg-O-Vision Song Contest
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team must battle to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's earth-shaking stomping performance at the Veg-O-Vision Song Contest.

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E99 - Running Around In Circles
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po run around in circles in Home Dome. The Noo-Noo joins in and the Teletubbies have fun chasing.

programme.title: E13 - Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `hedgehog', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we meet lots of hedgehogs: a brown hedgehog, a small hedgehog, a snuffling hedgehog and a hungry hedgehog.

programme.title: E13 - Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E4 - Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: E6 - Stumpfest
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: E9 - Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E41 - Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles Of Scilly
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E20 - Go Jetters Academy: Ghost Crabs
programme.desc: Glitch takes all the sand from the Academy beach, leaving the local crabs with nowhere to hide from hungry seagulls. Can the Go Jetters repair the beach before it's too late?

programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.desc: In Brazil, Thomas meets two wood-burning engines who've never travelled beyond their eucalyptus railway.

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: This Is How Rosalia Went From Unknown To Global Icon
programme.desc: The creative superpower of Rosalia - how did the Spanish singer become a pop icon? Spanish musician Rosalia is a global star - how did she go about developing her own style, fusing it with more traditional genres to create something totally new? We chart her meteoric rise, exploring how Rosalia Vila Tobella transformed from a small-town girl in Sant Esteve Sesrovires, Spain, into a music Icon.

programme.title: Smart Cars: Convenience V. Security Risk?
programme.desc: From military sites to everyday roads, connected cars raise new security questions; Europe is looking for rules instead of bans. Plus: REV puts the MG S6 through its electric paces.

programme.title: The Lure Of St. Moritz - Luxury, Snow And Winter Sports
programme.desc: St. Moritz is the birthplace of alpine winter tourism, as well of many winter sports. The village, with its magnificent location in the Swiss Engadin mountains, was already attracting celebrities in the last century.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'actualité ne s'arrête jamais. Un journal complet consacré à l'information française et internationale, pour rester informé à tout moment, où que l'on soit dans le monde.

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Le journal de l'Afrique
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique pour un rendez-vous quotidien afin de suivre l'actualité du continent africain, avec des correspondants et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E23

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E3

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E74
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E12 - The Villainess And The Saint
programme.desc: Mel uncovers the Saintess's secret, which turns out to be deeply tied to the academy's twisted situation.

programme.title: E13 - The Very Busy Academy Festival
programme.desc: As the school festival approaches, priest Shinai, arranges a meeting with Makoto. Shinai informs Makoto about rumors concerning the shop medicine and offering to help dispel them.

E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners
programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Get chills as winter descends, slowing down life on the bustling reef. Meander with reef sharks and octopuses, visit a coral oasis atop an old shipwreck, and spot a banded snake eel’s talent for identity theft when it disguises itself as a predator.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: There's A New Killer In Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programme.title: E5 - Tuscan Ribollita
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: E47 - Armenian Easter
programme.desc: Rachael loves Armenian food and shows how to prepare a traditional Armenian Easter feast of stuffed cabbage rolls, baked rainbow trout and sweet and savoury glazed fruit and potatoes.

programme.title: E5 - The Trunk Hive
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: E2 - New Life In Casacalenda
programme.desc: Giulio Steiger was a luxury shoe designer. He and his family owned shops around the world. Until the day he decided to abandon it all to settle in Molise. An isolated and still unspoilt region of Italy. His aim: to live a simple life tending his vines.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

Murder
programme.desc: When Yau argues with his wife Jessica for the uneven share of dirty money, he shoots her in coma. To find out the money, Yau hires Sister Ma to look after her...

programme.title: The Private Eyes
programme.desc: Joseph Wong (Michael Hui), the kingpin of the Manix Private Detective Agency, a firm believer in tact and thrift. By tact, he means you can cheat all the people all the time and corners are there to be cut. By thrift, he means an underpaid staff is happy and grateful staff. By chance, he employs Lee Kwok Kit (Samuel Hui). Together, they have solved lots of wired cases. One day, while the two are investigating a blackmail case, the movie goes off and the lights come on. Scores of gun-toting hoods hold the more than 1,000 goers as hostages. On the stage Uncle Gaw (Shek Kin) threatens that it is a hold-up!

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: Point Of No Return

programme.title: Daughter's Daughter
programme.desc: Now a widow in her sixties, Aixia must become a mother once more when she receives custody of her daughter's daughter – in the form of a fertilized embryo left by Aixia's daughter Zuer, who tragically died in a car accident. However, Aixia already has a second daughter: Emma, who Aixia abandoned as a teenager, and the shame over abandoning Emma has never faded.

programme.title: Love and the Grand Tug-of-war
programme.desc: A story of the sad love between a man who dedicates his youth to the nearly 420-year-old tradition of the Sendai Grand Tug-of-War, and a Korean medical resident who works on Koshiki island, and what happens with them and their families.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: Jiao Ye moved to Macau with her father when she was 15. She is a sassy casino worker who longs for love, but her life was hard. Daniel, a commitment-averse real estate agent in Los Angeles who specializes in selling properties to wealthy Chinese and father of a teenage son. Love blooms between the two as they start exchanging letters because of a book, they sharing their most personal and intimate self with each other.

programme.title: Twins Effect, The
programme.desc: Ace Vampire slayer Reeve and his new partner Gipsy are on this mission, however Reeve's younger sister Helen falls in love with the Vampire fifth prince Kazaf.

European Le Mans Series Highlights 2026 -Le Castellet
E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E4 - Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

E2 - Bangkok
programme.desc: It may be the backpacker's must-see, but if you go to the Venice of the East, don't drive!

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E9 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.desc: During a fight, Grizzy and the Lemmings stumble upon a Mayan temple lost in the jungle. Once inside, they set off a magic reaction that creates doubles of themselves at different ages.

programme.title: E132 - Lars' Head/Dewey Wins/Gemcation
programme.desc: Lars finally lets Steven in.

programme.title: E7 - Fun At The Museum/Bouncy Bridge Rhapsody
programme.desc: Shiro heads to a museum where he finds a dinosaur fossil! He can't find the Bobobobobone as there are too many bones. Will Shiro be able to get the Bobobobobone without being caught?

programme.title: E94 - The Slap/The Detective/The Fury/The Compilation/The Disaster
programme.desc: Tobias follows every high-five with a butt-slap, so when Gumball doesn't get one he feels insulted. He tries to get Tobias to slap his rear all day, but when it doesn't work he decides they need some enforced one-on-one bro-time to build their relationship up to a butt-slap.

programme.title: E21 - Tote Life/Video Date/Chloe and Ice Bear/Hibernation/Occupy Bears
programme.desc: When a hipster grocery store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic grocery bags, the Bears realise that eco-friendly tote bags are their way of gaining acceptance amongst the progressive people of the Bay Area. But in their effort to gain popularity, the Bears let the culture (and sheer number) of tote bags take over their lives.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world.
